2026-03-23T07:15:39.4746904Z Agent: Now let me look at the `any` types more carefully:
2026-03-23T07:15:39.4747866Z Agent: 1. `ErrorAdditionalInfo.info?: any` (line 1284 in the new API file) - This is a standard ARM error type. The `info` property of `ErrorAdditionalInfo` is always `any` in ARM SDKs because the additional info can be any JSON object.
2026-03-23T07:15:39.4748747Z Agent: 
2026-03-23T07:15:39.4749056Z Agent: 
2026-03-23T07:15:39.4750337Z Agent: 2. `OperationsDiscovery.properties?: any` (line 3894) - This comes from the ARM operations discovery spec which uses an untyped object for operation-specific properties. Both of these `any` types are expected from the ARM spec and were already present in the old API file, so I should verify they haven't changed.

2026-03-23T07:15:39.6583107Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-03-23T07:15:39.6583379Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-03-23T07:15:39.6583534Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-03-23T07:15:39.6583745Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-03-23T07:15:39.6584093Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-03-23T07:15:39.6584361Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-03-23T07:15:39.6584507Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-03-23T07:15:39.6584594Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-03-23T07:15:39.6584788Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-03-23T07:15:39.6584867Z [36;1mfi[0m
